summary: ANDROID 🟥 | CCL | CCL during call is blinking for blocking settings
scenario: CCL settings blink instead of being locked during an active call
description_clean: During a call, the CCL (Call Control Layer) settings blink instead of being locked/blocked as expected. Steps: Go to CCL and start a call, then verify CCL settings are locked. Observed: CCL settings are blinking. Expected: CCL settings are locked.
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Connect to a Poly Bluetooth audio device.
Initiate a call (e.g., via the device's Call button or through the phone dialer).
During the active call, navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
Observe the Call Control Layer (CCL) settings.
expected: CCL settings are locked/blocked and not interactive during an active call.
actual: CCL settings are blinking instead of being locked/blocked.
